hero.title: Top up your travel planning balance
hero.description: Buy coins to post requests and work with planners. Coins are only released to the planner when your request is completed.

balance.description: Use coins to publish requests and pay planners only after the planning process is completed.

starter.name: Starter Pack
starter.description: A light top-up for smaller trip requests.

standard.name: Standard Pack
standard.description: A balanced option for regular custom planning.

plus.name: Plus Pack
plus.description: A better value option for multiple requests.

pro.name: Pro Pack
pro.description: For travellers who expect to use the platform often.

step1.title: 1. Top up coins
step1.description: Travellers buy coins through the shop.

step2.title: 2. Post a request
step2.description: When you create a request, you set an offer cost and that amount is reserved from your balance.

step3.title: 3. Match with a planner
step3.description: A planner sends a proposal, and once you accept it, the request moves into the planning process.

step4.title: 4. Complete the request
step4.description: When the request is completed, the reserved coins are released to the planner.

history.title: Purchase history
history.description: Billing connection can be added next. For now this is a UI placeholder.

item1.title: Request offer cost
item1.description: Set the amount you want to reserve for that request.

item2.title: Safe release
item2.description: Coins move to the planner only after completion.

item3.title: Traveller visibility
item3.description: The shop is shown only to travellers.
